system.description:
Looking to the stars, you connect to a creature that embodies the spaces between.

LEVEL 3

Void Spawn. You can summon shadow minions within Reach 6.

Void Step. You and your allies can move between spaces your minions occupy as if they were the same space (as long as you do not end movement in an occupied space).

LEVEL 7

Voidstrike. You and your allies can attack between spaces your minions occupy as if they were the same space. Gain advantage when attacking this way.

The Vast Cold. Your minions inflict the Slowed condition when attacked in melee.

LEVEL 11

Void Singularity. A shadow can move into the space of another shadow to have both of them implode and die, dealing 2d12+20 damage to all creatures in Reach 3 and pulling them 3 spaces towards the middle.

LEVEL 15

The Consuming Dark. (1/encounter) When your Shadow minion kills an enemy you may have it transform into a Greater Shadow.

Urgent Command. Gain a wound to move your shadow minion as a Reaction.
